div1.entryFree:
Cart, subst. 1) a carriage on two wheels used by husbandmen: then to c. with Rosalind, As III, 2, 114. provide some --s and bring away the armour, R2 II, 2, 106. may not an ass know when the c. draws the horse? Lr. I, 4, 244. I cannot draw a c. V, 3, 38.
2) the vehicle in which criminals are carried to execution: if I become not a c. as well as another man, H4A II, 4, 546.
3) the car or chariot of Phoebus: Phoebus' c. Hml. III, 2, 165.
